name: Chicken Lo Mein
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into thin strips and coat with 1 tablespoon stir-fry sauce. Let stand for 30 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, cook the pasta without salt. Drain and rinse to cool and drain thoroughly.
3. Combine 1/3 cup stir-fry sauce and 3 tablespoons water in a bowl; set aside.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a hot wok or large skillet over high heat.
5. Add the chicken and stir-fry for 2 minutes, then remove.
6. Heat the remaining oil in the same pan.
7. Add peas and carrot, sprinkling with salt. Stir-fry for 4 minutes.
8. Add the sauce mixture, chicken, pasta, and sesame seeds. Cook, stirring until all ingredients are coated with sauce and the pasta is heated through.
